name: OLENOX INDUSTRIES INC.
business: Olenox Industries Inc. operates in four segments: manufacturing for construction, technology, oil and gas, and environmental services. The construction segment designs and constructs modular structures from recycled shipping containers. The technology segment offers turnkey remote monitoring solutions for oil and gas operations, while the oil and gas segment operates wells in multiple states and Canada. The environmental services segment provides renewable energy and other on-site services within the oil and gas industry.

exposures.sentence: We operate in the following four segments: (i) manufacturing for construction; (ii) technology; (iii) oil and gas; and (iv) environmental services.
Modules were supplied for residential projects, military storage use and power generation enclosures.
Our oil and gas wells operate in multiple states and in Canada.
The environmental services segment operates in the oil and gas industry and provides renewable energy and other services on-site.
In the technology sector, we offer turnkey solutions to monitor oil and gas operations remotely and other similar applications.

future work targets a major expansion into such products and services, including recharging stations for electric vehicles, data centers, warehouse/public storage, energy storage, and reclamation/drop off centers.

catalysts.sentence: On December 18, 2025, the Company acquired all of the outstanding shares of Giant Containers Inc.

catalysts.event: Merger agreement with New Asia Holdings, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On February 2, 2025, we executed a sign and close agreement to merge Olenox Industries Inc. ( OLOX ) with New Asia Holdings, Inc. ( NAHD ), the parent company of Olenox Corp. and Machfu, Inc.
